folio.label: 29r
folio.l: The grete ©iftes , to the most and lest
The riche a ray , of Theseus paleys
Ne who sat first ne last , vp on the deys
What ladies fairest ben , and best daunsynge
Or whicú of hem , kan best daunce or synge
Ne who most feyny~gly , speketh of loue
What haukes seten , on the perches a boue
What houndes liggen , on the flore a doune
Of al this , make I no menciou~
But al æe effect , that thynketh me the best
Now cometh the poynt , herkeneth if ©ow lest
¢ The Sonday nygút , or day bygan to spénge
Whan Palamou~ , the lark herde synge
Al thougú it nere nat day , by houres two
ñet song the lark , and Palamou~ rigút tho
With holy hert , and hey corage
He rod to wenden , on his pilgrimage
Vn to the blisseful , Sitheria benigne
I mene venus , honåable and digne
And in hire houre , he walketh forth a paas
Vn to the lystes , there hire temple was
And doun he kneletú , and with humble chere
And herte soor , he seide as ©e shuln here
Fairest of fair , O lady myn , venus
Dougútä to Ioue , and spouse to vulcanus
Thow glader , of æe mou~te of Scitherou~
For thilke loue , æè haddest , to Adoou~
Haue pyte , of my bytter teres smerte
And take myn humble preyer , at thyn herte
Allas I ne haue , no langage to telle
The effect , and the tåmentz of myn helle
Myn hert may nat , myn harmes bywrye
I am so sorweful , that I can nat seye
But mäcy lady brigút , that knowest wele
My thougút , and seest what harmes æ I fele
Considre al this , and rewe vp on my sore
As wysly , as I shal for euäe more
îfoåmyng be my mygút , thy trewe säuau~t to be
And holden werre alwey , with chastite
That make I myn a vow , so ©e me helpe
I kepe nat of armes , for to ©elpe
Ne I ne ask nou©t to morwe , to han victorie
Ne renou~ in this caas , ne veyn glorie
Of prys of armes , blowen vp and doun
¢ But I wold haue fully , possessiou

note.notetxt: 1384 There is a paragraph mark with a No bn~ in the left margin.Est
